Metadata.defaultDescription: Precision-engineered energy and building services in Luxembourg — photovoltaic systems, electrical installations, building automation, and heat pump solutions.
Metadata.legalDescription: Legal notice for Bulbau — company registration details, legal form, RCS Luxembourg and VAT numbers, and registered office in Luxembourg.
Metadata.privacyDescription: Privacy policy for Bulbau — how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in line with the EU GDPR.
Metadata.aboutDescription: Bulbau is a Luxembourg energy and building services company delivering photovoltaic, electrical, building-automation, and heat pump solutions.
Metadata.serviceDescription: Get an instant online price estimate for {service} from Bulbau — precision energy and building services in Luxembourg.

Footer.tagline: Professional energy and building services across Luxembourg. Precise engineering, reliable execution.

Home.heroSubtitle: Precision-engineered energy and building services — from photovoltaic systems and electrical installations to building automation and heat pump solutions.
Home.servicesSubtitle: Each service includes an online price estimator. Fill in your parameters and receive an instant quote — then contact us for a precise offer.
Home.servicesEmpty: Our services are being prepared. Please check back soon or contact us directly.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Use our online calculators to get an instant estimate, then contact us for a precise quote tailored to your needs.

Service.calcHeaderHint: Your estimate updates as you type
Service.disclaimerDefault: Estimate only. Prices generated here are automated estimates and may differ from the final price. Contact us at {phone} or {email} for a precise, binding quotation.
Service.noCalculator: This service does not use an online estimator. Contact us for a tailored quote.
Service.priceNote: This is an automated estimate and may differ from the final price.
Service.contactNote: We couldn't produce an estimate for these values. Contact us for a precise quote.
Service.enterRequired: Complete the required fields (*) to see your estimate.
Service.estimateAfterNote: All prices shown are automated estimates only. Contact us for a precise, binding quotation.
Service.downloadError: We couldn't generate your PDF just now. Please try again, or contact us directly at {phone} or {email}.
Service.downloadRateLimited: You've requested a few quotes in quick succession. Please wait a moment and try again.

Quote.title: Price Estimate
Quote.disclaimerBody: This quote is an automated estimate and does not constitute a binding offer. Please contact us to receive an accurate and final price.
Quote.footerNote: This is an automated estimate. Get in touch for a precise, binding quotation tailored to your project.

Projects.subtitle: A selection of installations across Luxembourg — each one engineered to specification and delivered on time.

Careers.title: Careers at Bulbau
Careers.subtitle: We're a growing team of engineers and technicians building Luxembourg's clean energy future. Precision, reliability, and continuous learning are at the heart of everything we do.
Careers.applyNotice: To apply for any position, contact us at {email} or call {phone}. Online applications are not available — reach out directly and we'll guide you through the next steps.
Careers.roleCount: {count, plural, =0 {No open roles} one {# role available} other {# roles available}}
Careers.emptyTitle: There are currently no open positions
Careers.emptyBody: Check back later or contact us — we are always open to great people.
Careers.spontaneousTitle: We're Always Open to Great People
Careers.spontaneousBody: Send us your CV and a short introduction — we'll keep your profile on file and contact you when a suitable position opens.

Legal.notAvailableBody: This page is being prepared and will be published shortly.
